data.title: Panthera Resources Advances Arbitration Over Indian Gold Project
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

The latest announcement is out from Panthera Resources Plc ( (GB:PAT) ).

Panthera Resources Plc has provided an update on its legal proceedings concerning the Bhukia project in India, highlighting the execution of terms of appointment for arbitration between their Australian subsidiary, Indo Gold Pty Ltd, and the Republic of India. The arbitration, administered by the Permanent Court of Arbitration in London, follows India’s alleged breach of a bilateral investment treaty and the revocation of IGPL’s rights to a prospecting license. The outcome of the arbitration could have significant implications for Panthera’s operations and strategic positioning in the gold exploration sector.

More about Panthera Resources Plc

Panthera Resources Plc is a company focused on gold exploration and development, with assets located in West Africa and India. Their primary activity involves the exploration of gold resources, and they have a significant interest in the Bhukia project in India.

YTD Price Performance: 16.67%

Average Trading Volume: 369,066

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: £17.18M

data.title: Bekaert Updates on Share Buyback and Liquidity Agreement
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Bekaert SA ( (GB:0OQJ) ) has provided an announcement.

Bekaert has been actively engaged in its first tranche of a share buyback program, intending to cancel all repurchased shares. Between January 2 and January 8, 2025, Bekaert repurchased 59,869 shares through Kepler Cheuvreux, with transactions conducted on Euronext Brussels and MTF CBOE. In addition, Bekaert’s liquidity agreement with Kepler Cheuvreux resulted in the purchase of 6,000 shares and the sale of 4,100 shares during the same period on Euronext Brussels. By the close of January 8, 2025, Bekaert held 2,296,856 own shares, amounting to 4.23% of the total outstanding shares, indicating strategic financial maneuvers to potentially enhance shareholder value.

More about Bekaert SA

Bekaert is a global leader in the material science of steel wire transformation and coating technologies, striving to innovate beyond steel in markets such as new mobility, low-carbon construction, and green energy. Founded in 1880 and headquartered in Belgium, Bekaert employs 24,000 people worldwide and reported a joint revenue of €5.3 billion in 2023.

YTD Price Performance: 1.12%

Average Trading Volume: 3,463

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: €1.67B

CAIXABANK ( (ES:CABK) ) has issued an announcement.

CaixaBank has announced the execution of its share buyback program, purchasing over 3.7 million shares between January 3 and January 9, 2025. This transaction, managed by Goldman Sachs Bank Europe SE, is part of the ongoing buyback initiative aimed at enhancing shareholder value, with the company having already acquired over 54 million shares, representing 56.5% of the program’s maximum monetary amount.

More about CAIXABANK

CaixaBank, S.A. is a leading financial institution in Spain, primarily engaged in providing banking and financial services. The company offers a wide range of services, including retail banking, corporate banking, and insurance, serving both individual and business clients in the Spanish market.

data.title: Japan System Techniques Co., Ltd. Expands into Middle East with New Subsidiary
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

An announcement from Japan System Techniques Co., Ltd. ( (JP:4323) ) is now available.

Japan System Techniques Co., Ltd. has announced the establishment of a new subsidiary, Virtual Calibre IT Solutions L.L.C., in Dubai, UAE, to expand its operations in the Middle East. This move is aimed at accelerating the growth of their SAP business in the region. The new subsidiary is expected to have a minimal impact on the company’s financial results for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2025.

More about Japan System Techniques Co., Ltd.

Japan System Techniques Co., Ltd. operates in the IT industry, focusing on system consulting services. The company provides business process outsourcing using SAP enterprise resource planning products, primarily serving large, government-owned companies in the energy sector across Malaysia, the ASEAN region, and South Asia.

data.title: Big Technologies PLC Executes Share Buyback to Enhance Market Position
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Big Technologies PLC ( (GB:BIG) ) has issued an update.

Big Technologies PLC recently executed a share buyback, purchasing 26,991 ordinary shares as part of a previously announced buyback program. This action reflects the company’s strategic financial management and may impact shareholder value by altering the share capital and treasury shares. By maintaining its current market focus and utilizing advanced technology in its operations, Big Technologies aims to strengthen its market position in the criminal justice sector.

More about Big Technologies PLC

Big Technologies PLC is a UK-based company specializing in remote personal monitoring technology, operating primarily within the criminal justice sector. Its flagship products include the Buddi Smart Tag and Buddi Eagle software, which provide state-of-the-art electronic monitoring solutions. These products are designed to offer significant cost savings and improved accuracy over competitors, enabling the company to capture market opportunities driven by the growing demand for electronic monitoring devices as alternatives to imprisonment.

data.title: Bewith, Inc. Revises Financial Forecasts Amid Sales Decline
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

The latest announcement is out from Bewith,Inc. ( (JP:9216) ).

Bewith, Inc. announced a discrepancy between its previously forecasted and actual financial results for the first half of the fiscal year ending May 2025, attributed to lower sales in public projects and challenges in acquiring new customers. Consequently, the company has revised its full-year financial forecasts downward, citing high operating costs due to previous growth investments and continued weak sales performance, while maintaining its dividend forecast.

More about Bewith,Inc.

Bewith, Inc. operates in the services industry and focuses on providing solutions across finance, ICT, and retail sectors, specifically within its Smart Life segment. The company is listed on the TSE Prime Market and engages in public projects while seeking to expand its customer base.
